rationale: Bug hunt on C9 files discovered BUG-026 HIGH: all biome CRT palette lookups used shortened keys (broceliande, landes, etc.) but callers passed canonical keys (foret_broceliande, landes_bruyere, etc.). Every biome fell back to the default broceliande palette — biome visual identity was completely non-functional during gameplay. Fixed with biome_palette_key() normalizer in MerlinVisual (3 lookup sites) and CRTLayer set_biome(). Feature: added compact HUD strip to encounter card overlay showing life (colored heart + bar), biome name, and card counter.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on cycle 10 code (encounter card HUD strip, biome_palette_key normalizer). Then: enhance run end screen with CRT styling and proper stats display, or implement biome particle effects for visual diversity.
